SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LOS SANTOS, HANNAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEES, JENNIFER BOUCHE, SHARMA $1,675.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,925.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
